challenges.title: Hover Card with Multiple Transforms
challenges.description: Create a card that translates up, scales slightly, and adds shadow on hover.
challenges.hint: Combine translateY, scale, and box-shadow transition.
challenges.expected_outcome: Card lifts and enlarges on hover.

solution.css: .card { transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease; } .card:hover { transform: translateY(-8px) scale(1.02); box-shadow: 0 12px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); }

challenges.title: Absolute Centering Challenge
challenges.description: Center a 200x100 div perfectly in a 500x300 container using transforms.
challenges.hint: Use position absolute with top:50%, left:50%, and translate.

solution.css: .child { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); width: 200px; height: 100px; }

challenges.title: Interactive Transform Chain
challenges.description: Create an element where each click adds another transform effect (move, rotate, scale, skew).
challenges.hint: Use JavaScript to cycle through transform classes.

solution.css: .s1 { transform: translateX(50px); } .s2 { transform: translateX(50px) rotate(45deg); } .s3 { transform: translateX(50px) rotate(45deg) scale(1.2); } .s4 { transform: translateX(50px) rotate(45deg) scale(1.2) skew(10deg); }

challenges.title: Transform Origin Selector
challenges.description: Create 5 small boxes showing the same transform applied from different transform origins.
challenges.hint: Use scale(1.5) with transform-origin at different corners.
challenges.expected_outcome: Same scale applied from different pivot points.

solution.css: .box1 { transform-origin: center; } .box2 { transform-origin: top left; } .box3 { transform-origin: top right; } .box4 { transform-origin: bottom left; } .box5 { transform-origin: bottom right; } .box:hover { transform: scale(1.5); }

challenges.title: CSS Matrix Calculator
challenges.description: Create a tool that shows the equivalent matrix() for a given set of transforms.
challenges.hint: Calculate combined matrix from translate, rotate, scale values.
challenges.expected_outcome: Matrix values update as transforms change.

solution.css: /* Complex JS solution needed to compute matrix multiplication */ .demo { transform: matrix(0.707, 0.707, -0.707, 0.707, 50, 0); /* rotate 45deg + translateX 50px */ }
